comment: data_20.l_0xc65efc (Onett, near world pixel 1568,1792). Sharks punks npc 142 + 143 (sprite group 284, movements 606/609) loiter at the road; bystander npc 1411 (group 214) hangs back. EB has them taunt the player toward Frank then set flag 364 via raw [1F F1 8F 00 7B 02] party/movement code. Recreated: the punks turn, size you up, drop the Frank threat, and the dispatch flag is set so the goons stop re-prompting.

pages: Two of them peel off the chain-link and step into your light. One's chewing something he stopped chewing a while ago.
"You lost, or just stupid? Same difference out here."
"You want to meet Frank. Everybody wants to meet Frank. Right up until Frank meets them."
He flicks his collar straight, like that settles it.
"Go on then. We'll be here for the part where you come back limping."
